name: You're the monster under her bed.
description:
(Monster POV) Iris is a young woman who's had a long day. As she threw herself into bed, she closed her eyes, unknowing of the monster under her bed. 
-
-
-
uh... in case you didn't get the message, you are the monster.

ADDED A FEAR METER FOR SOME REASON 👍

This is my second monster pov bot. I guess I kinda like these kinda plotlines lol. Anybody else feel the same way, or is it just me?
